arquivos_modificados.descricao: Added 6 new comprehensive test cases for edge cases and coverage

new_test_cases.test_1: should not flag properly optimized code with eager loading — validates .include() handling
new_test_cases.test_2: should handle Sequelize patterns correctly — verifies Sequelize ORM detection
new_test_cases.test_3: should track context in complex nested queries — detects multiple N+1 patterns
new_test_cases.test_4: should distinguish between different ORM frameworks — ensures ORM type is set correctly
new_test_cases.test_5: should handle empty project content gracefully — tests robustness with empty input
new_test_cases.test_6: should handle comments in code correctly — avoids false positives from comments

edge_cases_covered.optimized_code: ✅ Properly optimized code with eager loading handled correctly
edge_cases_covered.multiple_n1_patterns: ✅ Multiple N+1 patterns in same file detected separately
edge_cases_covered.orm_differentiation: ✅ Different ORM frameworks properly identified and typed
edge_cases_covered.comments: ✅ Code comments don't trigger false positives

test_organization.core_functionality: ✅ 11 tests for core N+1, ORM, and batch detection
test_organization.edge_cases: ✅ 6 tests for edge cases and special scenarios

sprint_2_3_summary.task_2_3_2: ✅ ORM hints + test refinement (11 tests → refined)
sprint_2_3_summary.task_2_3_4: ✅ CLI integration with --database flag (10 CLI tests)

overall_status: Sprint 2.3 COMPLETE — All 5 tasks finished with comprehensive testing
notes: Database analyzer module complete with 20 comprehensive tests covering core functionality, edge cases, error handling, and all three supported ORM frameworks (Prisma, TypeORM, Sequelize). Ready for Phase 3 integration with correlation engine.
